spec_match.rationale: Uses await using with [Symbol.asyncDispose] and demonstrates that the disposer runs at scope exit including on throw — the TC39 proposal.

interactive.rationale: Two scenarios (success / throw) with live log of disposer firing.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Card promises scenarios + log showing async disposer fires; delivered.

edge_cases.rationale: Doesn't show what happens when the asyncDispose itself rejects (Suppressed error chaining). Doesn't show ordering when multiple await usings nest.

openQuestions.title: Demonstrate SuppressedError chaining
openQuestions.detail: When a dispose method itself throws AND the scope was already throwing, the spec wraps both in SuppressedError. Add a scenario that produces this and surface the structure.

openQuestions.title: Show nested await using ordering
openQuestions.detail: Two await usings in the same scope dispose in LIFO order. Add a scenario where two disposers each log timestamps so the visitor sees the order.

summary: Solid base demo of await using with both success and throw paths. Could probe SuppressedError chaining and LIFO disposal order.
